post.content: When taking a CodeSignal Online Assessment, you\'ll give yourself the best chance by solving them in this order: 1, 2, 4, 3.\n\nThe 3rd question requires the most code and seems to be the most difficult. Question 1 & 2 are both easy, and together, they should be solved in under 20mins. All four questions are worth the same points.

All four questions are not worth the same points. For example, Q4 is weighted more than Q3.\n\nhttps://support.codesignal.com/hc/en-us/articles/360039879414-What-s-a-Coding-Score-and-how-do-I-interpret-my-GCA-Coding-Score-
Doesn\'t make sense. Each question builds on the former. Can you even solve Q4 without solving Q3?
